capabilities.name: repo_indexing_pipeline
capabilities.title: Repository indexing pipeline
capabilities.description: Repository intake, traversal, metadata extraction, and index write flow.
query_hints: repository indexing pipeline clone ingest metadata
repo_types_sought: Code search engines and source indexers
Data systems with explicit ingest and index-write paths
capabilities.why_useful_here: This project must ingest many repositories reliably, with evidence and metadata quality controls. Better indexing design directly improves retrieval trust.

capabilities.name: semantic_retrieval_stack
capabilities.title: Semantic retrieval stack
capabilities.description: Embedding generation, vector similarity search, and retrieval ranking logic.
query_hints: semantic retrieval embeddings vector search hybrid rank
cosine similarity ann nearest neighbors ranking
repo_types_sought: Vector databases and semantic search systems
Hybrid ranker and retrieval framework repos
capabilities.why_useful_here: Capability search quality depends on semantic retrieval and ranking. This capability strengthens query understanding beyond lexical keyword overlap.

capabilities.name: evaluation_harness
capabilities.title: Evaluation harness
capabilities.description: Benchmark datasets, quality metrics, and report comparison workflows.
query_hints: benchmark evaluation harness precision recall report
repo_types_sought: Mature repos with benchmark and regression workflows
Projects with quality dashboards and metrics reports
Libraries that compare baseline and candidate performance
capabilities.why_useful_here: Dogfooding requires proving quality changes with objective metrics, not intuition. A strong evaluation harness lets us iterate quickly without silent regressions.

capabilities.name: structured_filtering
capabilities.title: Structured filtering
capabilities.description: Filter extraction/parsing and metadata-aware result constraints.
query_hints: structured query filters language license metadata
repo_types_sought: Metadata-heavy repositories with structured query parsing
capabilities.why_useful_here: Users need dependable filters (language, license, framework) so results can be constrained to practical integration choices.
